description: Created using cotton fabric and with a strap at the back to customise the Fit, this cap from fila is a perfect blend of comfort and style.Crown made of cotton fabric and has eyelets to offer breathable comfort to the headCurved visor Twill strap at the back with a buckle clasp to customise the fit1973 print on the left side of the crown and embroidered brand logo on the right side for style Cap careHand wash in warm water at 40 degreesDo not wring, bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dry
